notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto grounds into a double play, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to first baseman Matt Olson. Michael Busch out at 2nd. Michael Conforto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Michael Harris II scores. Ha-Seong Kim out at home on the throw, center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong to shortstop Dansby Swanson to catcher Carson Kelly.
